title: O-06-20 (Nothing there)
description: A resource pack that replaces Warden with the anomaly Nothing there (O-06-20) from Lobotomy Corporation
body:
A resource pack replacing Warden with the anomaly of Nothing there (O-06-20) from Lobotomy Corporation.


### **REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR [EMF] AND [ETF] (if fabric)**

 
I actually made this resource pack for myself, but I wanted to share it with my friends.

And I didn't find any other way to send it.

 

I don't know what else to write about this, I made the model and textures
The rights to "Nothing There" (both the sounds and the anomaly itself) belong to Project Moon
